message:
fix(api,data,serialize): reject out-of-range indices and harden DataLoader shuffle

index_add, index_copy, and index_fill previously silently skipped
out-of-range index values instead of returning an error, diverging from
PyTorch semantics which raise IndexError. multi_margin_loss cast float
targets to usize without validating they were non-negative integers.

- index_add/index_copy: split the idx>=dim_size || si>=src_dim_size
  guard so OOB index is an error while OOB source index just skips
- index_fill: return error on OOB index instead of continue
- multi_margin_loss: validate targets are finite non-negative integers
  and within class count bounds via exact_nonnegative_index_to_usize
- DataLoader: add auto_shuffle/pending_shuffle fields so shuffle
  triggers correctly on epoch boundaries when config.shuffle is set
- Add 6 new tests covering each rejection case
- Update beads issue tracker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
